tagline: June 4, 2026 On July 8, 2026 at 00:00 UTC , Genie products will move to a pay as you go pricing model.
what_it_does: June 4, 2026 On July 8, 2026 at 00:00 UTC , Genie products will move to a pay as you go pricing model. Each user receives 150 DBUs of free LLM usage every month, equivalent to about $10.50 in the US East region.
why_it_matters: See [Manage budgets and cost controls for Genie](/aws/en/genie/budgets).

capabilities.title: June 4, 2026 On
capabilities.desc: June 4, 2026 On July 8, 2026 at 00:00 UTC , Genie products will move to a pay as you go pricing model.
